commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=120faa36d21657e4b8fbdc1bea408cafdc0708d2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram `/reasoning on` fallback that sends `onReasoningStream` payloads as durable messages and adds a unit test that manually invokes that callback.

PR surface: Source +19, Tests +47. Total +66 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source-level inspection shows current main emits `/reasoning on` thinking as `isReasoning` block/final payloads, then shared dispatch suppresses those payloads before Telegram delivery; I did not run a live Telegram session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Author or maintainer action is needed to move the fix to the actual durable `isReasoning` payload path and provide live Telegram proof; missing contributor proof keeps this out of the automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(telegram): deliver reasoning as durable block when /reasoning on
target.body:
## Summary
Fix `/reasoning on` dropping the thinking lane on Telegram. When reasoning mode is "on" (not "stream"), the `onReasoningStream` callback was unconditionally `undefined` because both the reasoning draft stream and the progress draft path were inactive. This caused the model's thinking content to be silently lost â€” produced and archived, but never delivered to the Telegram chat.

The fix adds a third fallback branch that sends reasoning text as a durable (non-streaming) block message when `forceBlockStreamingForReasoning` is true. It also wires `onReasoningEnd` for the block-streaming path to reset progress state.

Fixes #94937

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

**Behavior addressed**: Under `/reasoning on`, the model's `<think>` content is generated and archived but never rendered on Telegram. Under `/reasoning stream` the same content streams in an ephemeral block correctly.

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node 24.13.1, Linux x64
- **Code analysis path**: See root cause analysis in issue comments (5 Whys)
- **Test framework**: Vitest

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts --run
```

**After-fix evidence**:
```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  130 passed (130)
   Start at  22:19:21
   Duration  19.52s
```

**Observed result after the fix**: `onReasoningStream` callback is now defined when `/reasoning on` is active. The extracted and formatted reasoning text (e.g. `Thinking\n\n_ambient reasoning_`) is delivered via durable `sendPayload` instead of being silently dropped. No reasoning draft stream is created in "on" mode, matching intent.

**What was not tested**: Live Telegram end-to-end test with real model thinking output (requires configured bot + reasoning-capable model). The fix was verified at unit-test level and by tracing the full callback chain from `onReasoningStream` â†’ `splitTelegramReasoningText` â†’ `sendPayload` â†’ `deliverInboundReplyWithMessageSendContext`.

## Tests and validation
| Test Type | Result | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Unit Tests | âś… | 130 passed, includes new test for reasoning "on" durable delivery |
| Type Check | N/A | `tsgo` lanes only â€” not run locally per repo policy |
| Lint | N/A | `oxfmt`/`oxlint` config on file â€” no structural issues detected |

## Risk checklist
**Did user-visible behavior change?** `Yes` â€” `/reasoning on` now delivers thinking as persistent block messages on Telegram (previously silent drop).
**Did config, environment, or migration behavior change?** `No`
**Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change?** `No`

## Current review state
**What is the next action?** Maintainer review requested
